parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title orderList表示

actor 配達員
participant Courieridform.jsp
participant OrderListServlet
participant CourierDAO
participant Courier
participant Session
participant OrderDAO
participant Order
participant DetailDAO
participant Detail
participant Request
participant orderedlist.jsp

配達員 -[#green]> Courieridform.jsp : courierID入力
Courieridform.jsp -> OrderListServlet : リンク
OrderListServlet -> CourierDAO : findByCourierid()
CourierDAO -> Courier : 生成
CourierDAO --> OrderListServlet : Courier
OrderListServlet -> Session : Courier
OrderListServlet -> OrderDAO : findAll()
OrderDAO -> Order : 生成
OrderDAO -> DetailDAO : findByOrderid()
DetailDAO -> Detail : リスト生成
DetailDAO -> OrderDAO : ArrayList<Detail>
OrderDAO -> Order : setDetail\n(ArrayList<Detail>)
OrderDAO --> OrderListServlet : ArrayLisr<Order>
OrderListServlet -> Request : setAttribute(ArrayList<Order>)
OrderListServlet -> orderedlist.jsp : フォワード
orderedlist.jsp -> 配達員 : 表示

@enduml
```
